control_observations: Prenote trail: PLC-BANKINGO-039 carried bank-product wording, ACH routing metadata, and queue disposition from the nightly banking file.
Reconciliation checkpoint: banking operations reviewed row ownership, return-code state, and account-label normalization at 15:45 PDT on 2026-06-13.
Control note: the payment-election queue stores product labels exactly as received from bank documents and maps them separately during payroll export.

operational_detail_rows.note: Banking review stores the product wording exactly as it appears in the bank artifact, then records the normalized payroll account type in a separate export field. Row marker PLC-BANKINGO-039 was indexed from Account Election Naya Lin during the 2026-06-13 operations window.

ACH operators compare routing syntax, account-length rules, and prenote queue status before the row is released to payroll preview. The reviewer console surfaced field-family hints, queue history, and source timestamp before the row moved to retention.

The reconciliation view keeps bank source name, account label, return-code slot, and election-state history beside the row marker. Packet-adjacent exports keep enough metadata for audit reconstruction without changing the source row text.
